purpose: List, create, and (presumed) update grouping lists. A 'financial list' is the container - each engagement has at least the default 'FS Financial' list and may have multiple custom lists.

request_body_shape_create.number: string DIGITS ONLY ('01','03','11') - non-numeric -> 400 'Only Number are accepted'. ('FS' exists only as a system-seeded default.)
request_body_shape_create.name: string (display name)

DO_NOT_AUTOMATE_set_default: ⛔ TOMBSTONE 2026-05-31: changing the default grouping list is DESTRUCTIVE — it DELETES all notes/annotations/tickmarks tied to the previously-default list (unrecoverable, Kymera-class risk). Set-default must be a manual USER click in the UI; the skill will NOT implement it and the mutation endpoint is intentionally LEFT UNCAPTURED. Reading isDefault = fine; writing it = forbidden.
field_naming_quirk: The user-facing index is called `number` here, NOT `index`. Funds and TB groups use `index`. Keep this straight when scripting.
open_follow_ups: rename mechanic not captured (probably PATCH or PUT to /v1.0/financialList/{listId})
